name: People Nation
description: The People Nation is a multiethnic alliance of street gangs formed in 1978 in Chicago by the Vice Lords (Bobby Gore), Black P. Stones (Jeff Fort), and Latin Kings (Gustavo Colon) as a counter to the Folk Nation. Member gangs include Vice Lords, Latin Kings, Black P. Stones, Mickey Cobras, Four Corner Hustlers, Gaylords, and Latin Counts. They identify with the five-pointed star, five-pointed crown, left-side symbolism, and the phrase 'all is well.' Their motto against rivals: 'five alive, six must die' (referencing Folk Nation's six-pointed star).

sources.title: Almighty Black P. Stone Nation — Wikipedia
